title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
overview: A concierge teams up with a lobby boy to prove his innocence after he is framed for murder.

title: Arrival
overview: A linguist works with the military to communicate with aliens who have landed around the world.

title: Pride and Prejudice
overview: The spirited Elizabeth Bennet meets the reserved Mr. Darcy in rural England.
